tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Dog days suspended bass: if crankbait doesn't fire them up, try a spoon or hair jig that falls fast to where fish are. Rip it and let it fall back — resembles a dying shad. Hit a lot of spots, catch a few, move on. Rotate back to the same spots 3-4 times a day.'

knowledge.insight: KVD: 'Hot water dog days: bait and bass suspend off structure over deep points and humps. Clear water makes them selective and easily spooked — odds of catching several from one spot are minimal. Hit a lot of spots, catch a few, move on. Go back to the same area 3-4 times during the day while rotating with other spots. Give edgy bass time to forget what just happened.'
